tasks.subject: B5a Task a — Substrate Protocol + TransportError + provider_heartbeat_supported helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship `core/heartbeat_endpoints.py` substrate and `core/errors.py` extension that B5a Tasks b-d consume.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_endpoints.py` — `HeartbeatEndpoint` Protocol (`runtime_checkable`), `provider_heartbeat_supported(provider_kind: str) -> bool` helper with hardcoded `_HEARTBEAT_SUPPORTED = frozenset({"local", "runpod"})`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/errors.py` — add `class TransportError(KinoforgeError)`
- Create: `tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py` — runtime_checkable verification, helper table tests including SkyPilot-not-shipped drift-detector
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest.py` — add `FakeRunPodHeartbeatEndpoint` and `FakeSkyPilotHeartbeatEndpoint` fakes

**Acceptance Criteria (AC1):**
- [ ] `core/heartbeat_endpoints.py` exports `HeartbeatEndpoint` (Protocol, runtime_checkable) and `provider_heartbeat_supported`
- [ ] `core/errors.py` exports `TransportError(KinoforgeError)`
- [ ] `provider_heartbeat_supported("local")` True; `("runpod")` True; `("skypilot")` False; `("unknown")` False
- [ ] `isinstance(FakeRunPodHeartbeatEndpoint(), HeartbeatEndpoint)` True
- [ ] `isinstance(FakeSkyPilotHeartbeatEndpoint(), HeartbeatEndpoint)` True
- [ ] TZ-aware datetime round-trips through both fakes
- [ ] Double-write idempotent; transport-failure toggle raises `TransportError`
- [ ] SkyPilot fake truncates microseconds to 0 (second-precision mtime contract)

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_endpoints.py src/kinoforge/core/errors.py tests/providers/conftest.py tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py`

**See plan §Task a for full HEREDOC code blocks and step-by-step TDD sequence.**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_endpoints.py", "src/kinoforge/core/errors.py", "tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py", "tests/providers/conftest.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_endpoints.py src/kinoforge/core/errors.py tests/providers/conftest.py tests/core/test_heartbeat_endpoints.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HeartbeatEndpoint Protocol exported and runtime_checkable", "TransportError subclasses KinoforgeError", "provider_heartbeat_supported returns correct values for local/runpod/skypilot/unknown", "Both fake doubles satisfy the Protocol via isinstance", "TZ-aware datetime round-trips preserved", "Double-write idempotent", "SkyPilot fake truncates to second precision"], "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate.md", "planSection": "Task a"}
```

tasks.subject: B5a Task b — RunPodGraphQLHeartbeatEndpoint satisfier + wire-shape tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire-level GraphQL `podEditJob` tag write + `pod` query tag read satisfier with injectable `http_post` seam.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/heartbeat.py` — `RunPodGraphQLHeartbeatEndpoint`
- Create: `tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py` — wire-shape tests via spy `http_post`

**Acceptance Criteria (AC2):**
- [ ] write: POST URL equals `graphql_url`; payload contains `podEditJob` mutation
- [ ] write: `variables.input.podId == instance_id`
- [ ] write: `variables.input.tags == [{"key": "_kinoforge_last_heartbeat", "value": "<iso>"}]`
- [ ] write: GraphQL `errors` array → `TransportError`
- [ ] write: HTTP non-2xx via seam → `TransportError`
- [ ] read: payload contains `pod(...)` query
- [ ] read: `data.pod == null` → returns None (no `TransportError`)
- [ ] read: tag absent → returns None
- [ ] read: ISO parse failure → `TransportError`
- [ ] read: TZ-aware ISO with explicit offset round-trips with tzinfo preserved
- [ ] No new SDK dependency; default `_http_post` uses stdlib `urllib.request`

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/heartbeat.py tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py`

**See plan §Task b for full HEREDOC code blocks and step-by-step TDD sequence.**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/heartbeat.py", "tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/heartbeat.py tests/providers/runpod/test_heartbeat.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["write posts podEditJob mutation with correct payload", "write surfaces GraphQL errors as TransportError", "write surfaces HTTP non-2xx as TransportError", "read posts pod query with correct podId", "read returns None on data.pod == null", "read returns None on tag absent", "read raises TransportError on corrupted ISO value", "read preserves tzinfo with explicit offset", "no new SDK dependency; stdlib urllib default"], "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate.md", "planSection": "Task b"}
```

tasks.subject: B5a Task c — RunPod provider wiring + YAML gate + adapter dispatch + integration test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Production-side wire-up. `RunPodProvider` accepts `heartbeat_endpoint`, delegates from `heartbeat()`+`last_heartbeat()`; `ComputeConfig.heartbeat_mode` validates the literal set; `_adapters.build_heartbeat_endpoint_for(cfg, creds)` dispatches; orchestrator `_resolve_provider` injects.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py` — `heartbeat_endpoint` kwarg + `set_heartbeat_endpoint` + delegation in `heartbeat()` and new `last_heartbeat()`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/config.py` — `ComputeConfig.heartbeat_mode` literal-set field + validator
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py` — `ComputeProvider.set_heartbeat_endpoint` ABC no-op default
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/_adapters.py` — `build_heartbeat_endpoint_for(cfg, creds)` dispatch helper
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py` — `_resolve_provider` injects endpoint when `heartbeat_mode != "none"`
- Modify: `tests/providers/test_runpod.py` — kwarg/delegation tests
- Modify: `tests/core/test_config.py` — heartbeat_mode literal-set tests
- Modify: `tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py` — 3-tick RunPod integration test
- Create: `tests/test_adapters_heartbeat.py` — dispatch tests
- Modify: `tests/core/test_orchestrator.py` — `_resolve_provider` injection test

**Acceptance Criteria (AC3, AC4, AC5, AC9):**
- [ ] AC4: `ComputeConfig.heartbeat_mode` accepts `{"none", "graphql-tag", "selfterm-http", "ssh-touch"}`; rejects anything else
- [ ] Default `heartbeat_mode="none"` preserves existing YAML compatibility
- [ ] AC3: `RunPodProvider(heartbeat_endpoint=...)` accepts kwarg; methods delegate when set; no-op when None
- [ ] `last_heartbeat` returns `endpoint.read(id).timestamp()` when set + tag present
- [ ] `set_heartbeat_endpoint` installs endpoint post-construction
- [ ] AC5: dispatch raises `AuthError` on missing `RUNPOD_API_KEY`; raises `ValidationError` on RunPod-incompatible mode (`ssh-touch`); raises `ValidationError` on SkyPilot with any non-none mode (B5b pending)
- [ ] `_resolve_provider` calls dispatch + `set_heartbeat_endpoint` when `heartbeat_mode != "none"`
- [ ] AC9: HeartbeatLoop 3-tick integration produces monotonically-advancing ledger `last_heartbeat` floats matching `FakeClock` advance
- [ ] Existing test suite passes unchanged

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/providers/test_runpod.py tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py tests/core/test_config.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_adapters_heartbeat.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py src/kinoforge/core/config.py src/kinoforge/_adapters.py src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py`

**See plan §Task c for full HEREDOC code blocks and step-by-step TDD sequence.**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/runpod/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/core/config.py", "src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/_adapters.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/providers/test_runpod.py", "tests/core/test_config.py", "tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py", "tests/test_adapters_heartbeat.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/providers/test_runpod.py tests/core/test_heartbeat_loop.py tests/core/test_config.py tests/core/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_adapters_heartbeat.py -v && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["heartbeat_mode literal-set validator accepts/rejects correctly", "backward compat: default mode none preserves existing behavior", "RunPodProvider heartbeat_endpoint kwarg works", "heartbeat/last_heartbeat delegate to endpoint when set", "set_heartbeat_endpoint installs post-construction", "dispatch raises AuthError on missing RUNPOD_API_KEY", "dispatch raises ValidationError on provider-incompatible mode", "orchestrator _resolve_provider injects endpoint when mode != none", "HeartbeatLoop 3-tick integration produces monotonic ledger updates"], "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate.md", "planSection": "Task c"}
```

tasks.subject: B5a Task d — Layer V classify hook + HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING verdict + act_on_verdict WARN arm
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make Layer V's `classify` and `act_on_verdict` aware of substrate-missing axis. New `HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING` verdict; conservative-on-ignorance contract — sweeper MUST NEVER reap on this verdict.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py` — add `Verdict.HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING`; classify gate consults `provider_heartbeat_supported`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py` — `act_on_verdict` case-arm for new verdict: WARN-once + no-destroy; module-level dedup set + `reset_warning_dedup` test helper
- Modify: `tests/core/test_reaper.py` — verdict-table tests
- Modify: `tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py` — no-destroy + WARN-once tests

**Acceptance Criteria (AC6, AC7):**
- [ ] `Verdict.HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING` enum value `"HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING"` exists
- [ ] Default `Policy.act_verdicts` does NOT contain the new verdict
- [ ] AC6: classify emits `HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING` when `last_heartbeat is None` AND `provider_heartbeat_supported(provider_kind) is False`
- [ ] AC6: classify emits `HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN` when `last_heartbeat is None` AND substrate supported (operator opt-out)
- [ ] AC6: classify emits `LIVE` for runpod with fresh heartbeat
- [ ] AC6: classify emits `IDLE_REAP` for runpod with heartbeat older than dead-man window
- [ ] AC6: legacy entries without `provider_kind` treated as `HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN` (defensive)
- [ ] AC7: `act_on_verdict(HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING)` does NOT call `destroy_instance` or `ledger.forget`
- [ ] AC7: emits WARNING log line dedup'd by `(provider_kind, instance_id)` — 100 sweeps = 1 line

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_reaper.py tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py`

**See plan §Task d for full HEREDOC code blocks and step-by-step TDD sequence.**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "tests/core/test_reaper.py", "tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_reaper.py tests/core/test_reaper_actor.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py src/kinoforge/core/reaper_actor.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["HEARTBEAT_SUBSTRATE_MISSING verdict added to enum", "DEFAULT_APPLY_POLICY does not include new verdict", "classify emits new verdict on substrate-missing providers", "classify keeps HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN for substrate-supported providers with no data", "classify treats missing provider_kind as HEARTBEAT_UNKNOWN", "act_on_verdict no-destroy on new verdict", "WARN-once dedup per (provider_kind, instance_id)"], "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate.md", "planSection": "Task d"}
```

tasks.subject: B5a Task e — Cross-provider parity test suite
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Freeze the substrate Protocol contract from both sides (RunPod sub-second + SkyPilot second-precision-mtime). Lands in parallel with Tasks b-d; depends only on Task a.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/providers/test_heartbeat_parity.py` — parametrized class covering Local + FakeRunPod + FakeSkyPilot
- Modify: `tests/providers/conftest.py` — add `LocalHeartbeatEndpoint` adapter for parametrize symmetry

**Acceptance Criteria (AC8):**
- [ ] 9 parity invariants × 3 fakes = 27 test cases
- [ ] `test_read_of_never_written_returns_none` for all three
- [ ] `test_write_then_read_round_trips_wall_clock` for all three (SkyPilot tolerates 1s truncation)
- [ ] `test_double_write_same_ts_is_idempotent` for all three
- [ ] `test_write_then_overwrite_returns_latest` for all three
- [ ] `test_read_after_instance_destroyed_returns_none` for all three
- [ ] `test_transport_failure_raises_TransportError_on_write` for all three
- [ ] `test_transport_failure_raises_TransportError_on_read` for all three
- [ ] `test_second_precision_minimum` for all three
- [ ] `test_overwrite_does_not_create_second_slot` for all three

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/providers/test_heartbeat_parity.py -v && pixi run typecheck && pixi run pre-commit run --files tests/providers/test_heartbeat_parity.py tests/providers/conftest.py`

**See plan §Task e for full HEREDOC code blocks.**

tasks.subject: B5a Task f — Live RunPod heartbeat smoke + spec rate-limit annotation + PROGRESS closeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Real-cloud verification that `RunPodGraphQLHeartbeatEndpoint` round-trips wall-clock + characterize GraphQL rate-limit headroom. ≤ $0.05 live spend.

**Pre-conditions:**
- Tasks a-e merged (full prod path required)
- `pixi run preflight` clean (no live pods, clean tree, RUNPOD creds loaded)
- RED-scaffold (smoke script + failing test) committed BEFORE live invocation per CLAUDE.md durability rule

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/live/test_runpod_heartbeat_live.py` — gated by `KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1`; cheapest CPU pod; 60s session; 2 ticks; latency capture; 429-detect; latency sidecar JSON
- Amend: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate-design.md` (§9 P50/P99; §11 Risk 2 rate-limit observation)
- Update: `PROGRESS.md` (B5 → strikethrough CLOSED; B5b new entry gated on A3/A4)
- Create: `tests/live/_runpod_heartbeat_smoke_latencies.json` — sidecar latency stats

**Acceptance Criteria (AC10):**
- [ ] Bare CPU RunPod pod; 60s session; 2 heartbeat ticks
- [ ] Orchestrator-side `last_heartbeat` matches write time within 1s on each tick
- [ ] Per-tick latency P50 + P99 captured in sidecar JSON + spec §9 amendment
- [ ] 429 within 30s → fail-loud with diagnostic + spec §11 Risk 2 amend
- [ ] No 429 in 60s → document baseline in spec §11 Risk 2
- [ ] Pod destroyed via existing teardown path; ledger entry's final `last_heartbeat` matches the final write within 1s
- [ ] `pixi run preflight` exits 0 post-run (no orphaned pod)
- [ ] Total session spend ≤ $0.05
- [ ] PROGRESS.md updated per spec §15: B5 striked CLOSED; B5b new entry; RESUME points at B7

**Verify (manual operator orchestration):**
1. RED-scaffold commit: `git add tests/live/test_runpod_heartbeat_live.py && git commit`
2. `pixi run preflight` (must exit 0)
3. `KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run test tests/live/test_runpod_heartbeat_live.py -v -s`
4. `pixi run preflight` (must exit 0 — no orphaned pod)
5. Amend spec §9 + §11 from sidecar; update PROGRESS.md
6. Closeout commit

**See plan §Task f for full HEREDOC code blocks.**

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_runpod_heartbeat_live.py", "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate-design.md", "PROGRESS.md", "tests/live/_runpod_heartbeat_smoke_latencies.json"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run preflight && KINOFORGE_LIVE_RUNPOD=1 pixi run test tests/live/test_runpod_heartbeat_live.py -v -s && pixi run preflight", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Bare CPU pod spawned cheaply", "2 heartbeat ticks succeed within 60s", "Each write-read round trip within 1s", "Latency P50+P99 captured to sidecar JSON", "429 detection wired (fail loud if rate-limit hit)", "Pod destroyed cleanly via teardown path", "preflight clean post-run", "Spend <= $0.05 USD", "Spec §9 + §11 amended with measurements", "PROGRESS.md B5 striked CLOSED; B5b new entry"], "live_spend_usd_cap": 0.05, "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-12-b5a-heartbeat-substrate.md", "planSection": "Task f"}
```
